header_title.description: App-ip aqqa header-imi takuneqarsinnaasoq. Nunarsuarmi nerisassat ilisimatitsinerannut app-i.

home_page_hero_title.description: Aningaasaqarnermut ullut akornanni hero immikkoortortaq qitiuvoq.

home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Hero qitiuvoq kingusinnerusoq subtitle-tut takuneqarsinnaasoq ullut akornanni.

home_page_featured_title.description: Nerisassat kortit qitiuvoq takuneqarsinnaasoq immikkoortortaq qitiuvoq.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Nerisassat kortimi atortut atorlugit ukiunik paasissutissiisoq. {minutes} ukiunut allanngortinneqassaaq.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Aqutsineqartartoq qaammatit iluanni nerisassat, chashu qernertut, qeqqussut qernertut, aammalu nillataq nutaaq.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: San Marzano atorsinnaasut, mozzarella nutaaq, aamma basil qernertut, Neapolitan pizza klassik.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Marineret porki tacos, annanas, cilantro, aamma qarasaasiaq corn tortillas-imi.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Qimussimik qaqugu, tomatomi, qimussimik saasiaq, aamma aaliangersimasunik aserorsimallutik.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Qaqqap qernertup, tofu, peanuts, tamarind saasiaq, sorlermi qernertut nerisassat.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Nutella, nutaaq strawberry, aamma qernertut qernertut, qernertut crepes.

locale_switcher_label.description: Header-imi oqaasii allanngortinneqartarnissaat atorlugu accessible label.
